4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","settlement-hardening-v3",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","settlement-hardening-v3","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/11s0gjiai6hjq.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0sr6f3rgdkukk.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/10_9opwzz0v93.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable 20:["$","div",null,{"ref":"$undefined","className":"rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-[linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,16,30,0.92),rgba(8,10,22,0.96))] shadow-[0_20px_80px_rgba(0,0,0,0.28)] backdrop-blur mt-10","children":["$","div",null,{"ref":"$undefined","className":"p-6 sm:p-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6","children":[["$","$1","block-0",{"children":["$","p","p-0",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"<!-- SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later -->"}]}],["$","$1","block-1",{"children":["$","h1","h1-2",{"className":"text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-4xl","children":"Settlement Hardening V3"}]}],["$","$1","block-2",{"children":["$","p","p-5",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"`Settlement Hardening V3` is an additive confidential-payout execution path. It does not remove or reinterpret legacy payout plans or `V2` settlement evidence."}]}],["$","$1","block-3",{"children":["$","h2","h2-9",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"What V3 Adds"}]}],["$","$1","block-4",{"children":["$","ul","l-20",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-20-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"DAO-level settlement policy companion account"}],["$","li","l-20-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Proposal-level settlement policy snapshot"}],["$","li","l-20-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"minimum settlement evidence age before execution"}],["$","li","l-20-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"maximum payout cap per governed payout"}],["$","li","l-20-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"optional REFHE settlement requirement"}],["$","li","l-20-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"optional MagicBlock settlement requirement for token payouts"}],["$","li","l-20-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`execute_confidential_payout_plan_v3`"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-5",{"children":["$","h2","h2-23",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Why It Exists"}]}],["$","$1","block-6",{"children":["$","p","p-26",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"`V2` already added threshold-attested settlement evidence, freshness windows, and single-use consumption. V3 adds execution policy locking on top of that so a payout can be forced to respect the same economic and integration assumptions it was reviewed under."}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","h2","h2-30",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"V3 Security Goals"}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","ul","l-39",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-39-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"prevent executing immediately on newly recorded evidence when an operator wants a minimum evidence aging window"}],["$","li","l-39-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"prevent executing payout amounts above a DAO-defined cap"}],["$","li","l-39-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"force REFHE settlement when the DAO requires it"}],["$","li","l-39-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"force MagicBlock settlement for token payouts when the DAO requires it"}],["$","li","l-39-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"bind those requirements to a proposal-scoped snapshot so later DAO policy changes do not silently reinterpret an existing payout"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","h2","h2-42",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Compatibility Boundary"}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","ul","l-49",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-49-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"legacy payout execution remains callable"}],"$L21","$L22"]}]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27"]}]}]}]
21:["$","li","l-49-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`execute_confidential_payout_plan_v2` remains callable"}]
22:["$","li","l-49-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"V3 strictness applies only when the operator explicitly initializes the V3 policy, snapshots it for the proposal, and uses the V3 execute path"}]
23:["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","h2","h2-52",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Current Verification Status"}]}]
24:["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","p","p-55",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Implemented, locally verified, and backed by a dedicated Devnet proof packet:"}]}]
25:["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","ul","l-61",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-61-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Rust compile and unit test pass"}],["$","li","l-61-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"TypeScript typecheck passes"}],["$","li","l-61-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"preserved Devnet proof exists in [`docs/test-wallet-live-proof-v3.generated.md`](test-wallet-live-proof-v3.generated.md)"}]]}]}]
26:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","p","p-62",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Operational note:"}]}]
27:["$","$1","block-15",{"children":["$","ul","l-68",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-68-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"this is an additive hardening layer"}],["$","li","l-68-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`Settlement Hardening V3` now has a dedicated Devnet rehearsal artifact proving the V3 execute path with proposal-scoped settlement policy snapshots and verified settlement evidence"}],["$","li","l-68-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"that artifact is still a test-wallet Devnet packet, not a production-custody or mainnet claim"}]]}]}]
